en.extract:
The drab myzomela or Seram myzomela (Myzomela blasii) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to the islands of Seram, Boano and Ambon in Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''drab myzomela''' or '''Seram myzomela''' ('''''Myzomela blasii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the islands of [[Seram]], [[Boano]] and [[Ambon Island|Ambon]] in [[Indonesia]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
